## Issue

- Issue: `URM-`
- Branch: `feat/URM-{issue-id}-{short-description}`

## CodeRabbit

- On PR open, comment:
  - `@coderabbitai review`
  - `@coderabbitai summary`
- Do not treat the change as unblocked for follow-up work until CodeRabbit review is complete.

## Summary

- What changed:
- Why:

## Tests Run

- [ ] Typecheck
- [ ] Unit/integration tests
- [ ] E2E or smoke tests

Commands:

```bash
# paste commands run here
```

## Deploy Impact

- [ ] No deploy impact
- [ ] Requires deploy
- [ ] Requires coordinated deploy

Notes:

## Checklist

- [ ] PR title includes the issue key when applicable
- [ ] Branch name follows `feat/URM-{issue-id}-{short-description}`
- [ ] CodeRabbit review requested with `@coderabbitai review`
- [ ] CodeRabbit summary requested with `@coderabbitai summary`
- [ ] Tests were updated in the same PR if behavior changed
- [ ] No secrets or tokens exposed
- [ ] This is not being treated as done until tested, committed, and deployed from a clean tree
